The much-awaited Aussie Favourite collab ; Cadbury Caramilk & Biscoff. Get ready for the collab you've been craving! Experience the irresistible pairing of smooth Cadbury Caramilk Caramelised White Chocolate with the crunchy delight of Lotus Biscoff caramelised biscuit.

This iconic collaboration brings together two global taste icons , perfectly combined in one decadent block.It's the beloved smooth Cadbury Caramilk you know and love, now united with a biscuit twist you'll adore.

Whether it's a cosy 'me time' treat, an afternoon pick-me-up, or a delicious shareable moment with friends and family, this Cadbury Caramilk & Biscoff block is the perfect choice. Don't miss out on this epic  Cadbury Caramilk & Biscoff block . Taste it now!

Proudly made in Tasmania.

Cadbury is committed to sustainability: our cocoa is sustainably sourced. We partner with cocoa farmers, empowering them with knowledge and skills to improve their livelihoods, strengthen their communities, and inspire the next generation of cocoa farmers.



An Aussie Favourite Collab

Cadbury Caramilk & Biscoff

Caramelised white chocolate with caramelised biscuit pieces

Deliciously smooth and creamy Cadbury Dairy Milk milk chocolate.

The equivalent of a glass and a half of full cream milk in every 200g of Cadbury Dairy Milk Milk Chocolate. Proudly made in Tasmania. 

Sustainably sourced cocoa. We partner with cocoa farmers to help them gain knowledge and skills to improve their livelihoods, strengthen their communities and inspire the next generation of cocoa farmers.

A Cheer & A Half
Let's celebrate the inspiring moments of generosity within our community, on and off the field with a cheer and a half. 

A Cheer & A Half 
For Leadership
Football royalty, Adam Goodes is the true embodiment of a leader. This was on full display during his team's glorious 2012 premiership win. Playing through a torn knee ligament, Adam fought through the pain and stood up when it counted for his team, kicking a much needed goal in the dying minutes of the match. 

A Cheer & A Half
For Being a Legend
Australian cricket legend Mark Taylor ended the 2nd day of a 5-Day test against Pakistan with 334 runs not out, tying with Don Bradman's Australian record. Leading Pakistan before the third day, Mark decided to declare alongside Don's record, instead of surpassing him, showing respect to the all-time great of the game. 

A Cheer & A Half
For Being a Mate
Running alongside a fellow Aussie in the last event of the 2020 Olympic Decathlon, Cedric Dubler realised his teammate was off pace in the closing stages of the 1500M. He needed to stay in touch with the runners ahead to secure enough points for a bronze medal. Cedric, knowing that he himself couldn't place, instead decided to cheer on his mate to a bronze medal finish. 

A Cheer & A Half
For Purpose
As the first Australian rugby team left for the UK in 1908, the British press nicknamed them 'The Rabbits'. The men gave themselves a different name, 'The Wallabies' - for their purpose would be to never take a backward step. They defeated England 9-3 and The Wallabies legacy was forged and preserved by all who wear the iconic gold jersey. 

A Cheer & A Half
For Respect
Daisy Pearce is one of the most respected pioneers of women's football. Along with being an exceptional captain and expert commentator, Daisy is a mum to twins and the first active player to return to top level women's football post pregnancy, paving the way for other women to do the same. 

A Cheer & A Half
For A Sportsman
Simon Clarke is one of Australia's greatest cyclists and sportsmen. In 2015, Clarke was behind a fellow Aussie competing in the final stretch of a road race when he noticed their tyre was punctured. Even though they were on different teams, Clarke rushed to his countryman's aid, giving him his own spare wheel to help him finish the race. 

A Cheer & A Half
For Team Spirit
During the 2020 Olympics, the Matildas decided to make one small change when walking on the field in the ultimate act of team spirit. Competing teams would normally pose with their nation's flag. The Matildas instead decided to display the Aboriginal flag as a sign of unity across the country. 

A Cheer & A Half
For Courage
Sam Bloom is one of Australia's most accomplished surfers. After falling from a balcony, Sam tragically shattered her spine, leaving her paralysed from the chest down. A testament to how far courage can take you, Sam rehabilitated herself and went on to become a 2x world and Australian Para Surfing champion, inspiring all Australians to never give up. 

Join us in cheering on your heroes both on & off the field by heading to our website today https://www.cadburycheerandahalf.com.au/

With MALTESERS® Bar, you’ll enjoy crunchy miniature MALTESERS® pieces floating in creamy milk chocolate in the form of a chocolate bar - an ingenious way to stop those cheeky MALTESERS® from rolling away!

MALTESERS® milk chocolate bar melts in your mouth and makes any moment a little less serious. The lighter way to enjoy chocolate, MALTESERS® chocolate bar loves creating light-hearted moments with everyone. MALTESERS® chocolate bar is also the perfect size for snacking on the go or as the essential movie night snack. MALTESERS® milk chocolate bars are perfect to be shared with your best friends, brought to a party or stashed in the pantry for when you need a little treat! If you're in a baking mood, this crunchy chocolatey treat is great as a cake topper or can even be mixed into the batter!

AdditionalAttributes.description:
Naturally Delicious

Made with only three simple, quality ingredients, Cobs Sea Salt Popcorn contains no artificial flavours, colours, or preservatives. It's gluten-free, nut-free, vegetarian, vegan and contains wholegrain. Next time you need a light, crunchy, and naturally flavourful snack, reach for the popcorn that Aussies love.


Australian-Made

Our Sea Salt is made right here in Australia using quality, locally sourced corn kernels. Popped to perfection in high oleic sunflower or canola oil, we create fluffy and crunchy popcorn, to which we sprinkle the perfect amount of sea salt.


The Perfect Snack for Every Occasion

Whether you're enjoying a backyard barbecue, packing school lunches, or settling in for a cozy movie night, Cobs Sea Salt Popcorn is the go-to snack. Its satisfying crunch and classic salty flavour make it the perfect companion for road trips, picnics, and afternoon pick me-ups.

An Australian-made Fan Favourite
Smith’s Crinkle Cut Chicken Potato Chips were introduced as Australia’s first flavoured chips in 1961 and continue to satisfy Aussie families with the same passion and dedication to taste. 
Our Crinkle Cut Chicken Chips are made from no artificial flavours or colours and they’re even gluten free, making them perfect tabletop snacks at your party.

Potato Snacks Fit For Any Occasion
Smith’s Chicken Chips are the perfect lunch snacks to pack for outdoor activities like watching the kids play sport or enjoying a picnic in nature. So grab a bag of Smith’s Chips today for a delicious savoury snack to be enjoyed at any occasion.

You know you love ‘em.

Satisfy your snack cravings with Continental Classics Creamy Chicken with Lots of Noodles Cup A Soup. Proudly made in Australia with flour from sustainably grown Australian wheat, this hearty chicken soup tastes so good it's hard to believe it comes from a packet. Simply add boiling water and stir continuously for 15–20 seconds to enjoy this delicious, warming soup in a cup.

For over 70 years, Continental has been a trusted brand in Australian households, providing delicious and wholesome soups made with only the finest ingredients. Each soup is crafted with a careful selection of vegetables, herbs and spices, which are then transformed into indulgent soup recipes, including classic well-loved flavours like Chicken Noodle, Homestyle Pumpkin and Italian Minestrone. Continental Cup A Soup is packed with real flavour and delightful taste, offering a convenient and satisfying soup snack – perfect on its own or as a hearty addition to your lunch, dinner or whenever you feel like complementing your meals with an added easy, tasty treat.

Continental is committed to consistently delivering flavourful, convenient and quality products. We know how much Aussies value delicious, nutritious food, as well as authentic home cooking, so we go to extraordinary lengths to be your ally in the kitchen – providing guaranteed taste and making meals irresistibly tasty! To explore the full range of Continental Classics Cup A Soup, visit our site: www.continental.com.au.

AdditionalAttributes.ml_enriched_product_description: Cobs Natural Popcorn Best Ever Butter is your delicious choice for a light snack. It's gluten-free for everyone to enjoy. Available at Woolworths online.
AdditionalAttributes.description:
Naturally Delicious

Cobs Best Ever Butter Popcorn was named for good reason. Made with quality ingredients, Cobs Best Ever Butter Popcorn contains no artificial flavours, colours, or preservatives. It's gluten-free, nut-free, vegetarian and contains wholegrain. Next time you need a light, crunchy, and naturally flavourful snack, reach for the popcorn that Aussies love.


Australian-Made

Cobs Best Ever Butter Popcorn is made right here in Australia using quality, locally sourced corn kernels. Popped to perfection in high oleic sunflower or canola oil, we create fluffy and crunchy popcorn, to which we add the perfect blend of butter and sea salt.


The Perfect Snack for Every Occasion

Whether you're enjoying a backyard barbecue, packing school lunches, or settling in for a cozy movie night, Cobs Sea Salted Caramel Popcorn is the go-to snack. This buttery creamy popcorn is the perfect companion for road trips, picnics, and afternoon pick me-ups.
